title: Loki and the Holy Knights
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Saul, Unknown person #11, Robin, Vegapunk, Unknown person #12 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Heheh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Dereski shi shi!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Did I getcha?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Guess not...

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: Robin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Dereeshi shi shi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I know you're not a kid anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry. I wasn't sure how to break the ice after all this time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehe. You still have the same funny laugh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dereski shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now... Lemme get a good look at your face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You've grown as pretty as Olivia!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: SAUL former navy vice admiral Robin's Savior

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You look just like her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Like Mother???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We cannot give up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...on the future you will live in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You'll understand someday.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You have kind eyes, just like her.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Did you hear vegapunk's broadcast, Robin?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was there when it happened, so I couldn't hear much...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: but I read the coverage of it in the papers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: History is written by the victors...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Those words were Ohara's legacy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were supposed to have been buried in history...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: left to vanish without anyone hearing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet, the "voices" of the scholars of Ohara were passed on!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk was a true scientist!! He refused to preach about right and wrong, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the end, he still risked his life to tell everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ohara and vegapunk took a huge leap of faith!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure their sacrifice will shape the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And yours too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Tap

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Does it hurt?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dereski shi!! Nah, I'm harder to kill than I thought!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I came to, I found myself drowning in the ocean!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ice must've melted in that inferno and swept me into the water...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a while later when I found out you survived, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All those reports really ticked me off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They said such awful things about you!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
